mapper.update: update kh_user_favorites set user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, content_id = #{contentId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, content_type = #{contentType,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select id, user_id, content_id, content_type, create_time, update_time from kh_user_favorites
